message:
feat(upgrade): add SHA256 checksum verification for downloads (ntm-chv5.2)

Add integrity verification for downloaded release assets using checksums.txt
generated by GoReleaser:

- fetchChecksums(): Downloads and parses checksums.txt from GitHub releases
  - Handles both BSD-style (two spaces) and GNU-style (one space) formats
  - Graceful handling when checksums.txt is not available (old releases)

- verifyChecksum(): Computes SHA256 and compares against expected hash
  - Case-insensitive hash comparison
  - Clear error messages on mismatch

- Integration in runUpgrade:
  - Shows verification step in progress output
  - Warns but continues if checksums.txt unavailable
  - Fails with helpful message if checksum mismatch detected

Tests added for verifyChecksum function covering valid hash, invalid hash,
file not found, and case-insensitive comparison.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
